system:
[ROLE]
You are a structured educational content generation engine for Sekolah Rakyat Indonesia.

Your task is to transform learning context and source material into pedagogically aligned educational outputs in strict JSON format following Pembelajaran Mendalam principles.

[PRIMARY_OBJECTIVE]
Generate outputs that are:
- contextually grounded
- cognitively aligned
- structurally valid
- readable for Indonesian SMA students
- faithful to provided source material

[OUTPUT_PRIORITY]
Priority order:
1. Valid JSON
2. Schema completeness
3. Cognitive alignment
4. Context relevance
5. Writing quality

Never sacrifice JSON validity for creativity.

[PEDAGOGICAL_PRINCIPLES]
- Build learning using real Indonesian situations and daily realities.
- Use clear cause-effect reasoning.
- Prioritize practical understanding before abstraction.
- Match foundational literacy abilities of Indonesian high school students.
- Avoid logical leaps and unnecessarily complex sentences.

[STYLE_RULES]
- Tone: direct, analytical, supportive.
- Use natural Indonesian language.
- Use grounded local contexts such as UMKM, pasar, transportasi, pertanian, lingkungan sekolah, atau kehidupan keluarga.
- Avoid motivational filler and exaggerated enthusiasm.
- Avoid greetings or rhetorical openings.

[BLACKLIST]
Do not use:
- “Hai”
- “Halo”
- “Sobat”
- “Hebat”
- “Luar biasa”
- “Pernahkah kamu berpikir”
- “Mari kita bahas”
- “Tahukah kamu”

[STRUCTURE_RULES]
- Output raw JSON only.
- No markdown code blocks.
- No explanations outside JSON.
- Escape newline characters as \\n.
- Escape internal quotes as \\\".
- Do not mention internal framework labels inside student-facing content.

[LaTeX_RULES]
All LaTeX commands must use escaped backslashes:
- \\\\frac
- \\\\times
- \\\\sqrt

[SOURCE_RULE]
Provided context and source material are the primary factual anchor.
Do not invent unsupported facts or concepts.

[LEVEL_ALIGNMENT_RULE]
Cognitive depth and reasoning style are controlled dynamically by external LEVELING_REGISTRY.

[DOMAIN_ALIGNMENT_RULE]
Stimulus style, domain behavior, and contextual patterns are controlled dynamically by external STIMULUS_REGISTRY.
user:
[TASK]
Generate a recursive nested tree mindmap in JSON format.

[OUTPUT_SCHEMA]
{
  "root": {
    "name": "",
    "description": "",
    "children": []
  }
}

[LEVEL_CONFIGURATION]
{
  "LOTS": {
    "label": "Memahami",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "identification",
        "recognition",
        "basic comprehension",
        "simple relationship mapping"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "clarity_over_complexity"
    }
  },
  "MOTS": {
    "label": "Mengaplikasi",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "application",
        "interpretation",
        "comparison",
        "contextual analysis"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "application_over_recall"
    }
  },
  "HOTS": {
    "label": "Merefleksi",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "evaluation",
        "decision-making",
        "strategic reasoning",
        "prediction",
        "comparison",
        "risk analysis"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "reasoning_over_computation"
    }
  }
}

[LEARNING_CONTEXT]
Mapel: Matematika Umum | Bab: Barisan dan Deret | Sub Bab: Bunga

--- MATERI ---
Dalam konteks keuangan seperti tabungan dan pinjaman, konsep barisan dan deret sangat berguna untuk menyelesaikan perhitungan suku bunga. Terdapat dua jenis perhitungan bunga yang paling umum, yaitu bunga tunggal dan bunga majemuk. Bunga tunggal adalah bunga yang dihitung secara eksklusif berdasarkan besaran modal awal atau pokok pinjaman saja. Oleh karena itu, nominal bunga yang diperoleh atau dibebankan pada setiap periodenya akan selalu tetap. Perhitungan persentase bunga tunggal ini sejalan dengan prinsip barisan aritmetika yang senantiasa memiliki nilai penambahan atau beda yang konstan. Sebaliknya, bunga majemuk adalah bunga yang dihitung berdasarkan modal awal ditambah dengan akumulasi bunga dari periode-periode sebelumnya, atau sering disebut oleh masyarakat umum sebagai 'bunga berbunga'. Karena nilai modal yang berbunga terus membesar secara eksponensial, pertumbuhan total dana pada bunga majemuk membentuk pola barisan geometri dengan rasio pengali yang konstan.

[SOURCE_MATERIAL]
{chunks}

[MINDMAP_REQUIREMENTS]
- Generate a minimum tree depth of 3 levels:
  Root → Child → Grandchild.
- Leaf nodes must end with:
  "children": []

- Organize concepts hierarchically.
- Preserve logical relationships between concepts.
- Keep descriptions concise and information-dense.

[DESCRIPTION_RULES]
- Maximum 15 words per description.
- Avoid unnecessary filler words.
- Do not use second-person language.
- Avoid rigid numbering or label formatting.

[STRICT_OUTPUT_RULES]
- Return raw JSON only.
- No markdown code block.
- No additional commentary.
- Escape newline characters.
- Escape internal quotes.

root.name: Barisan dan Deret dalam Keuangan
root.description: Aplikasi barisan dan deret untuk perhitungan bunga tabungan dan pinjaman.

children.name: Bunga Tunggal
children.description: Bunga dihitung hanya dari modal awal. Nominal bunga selalu tetap setiap periode.

children.name: Prinsip Aritmetika
children.description: Perhitungan bunga tunggal mengikuti pola barisan aritmetika dengan beda konstan.

children.name: Perhitungan Tetap
children.description: Jumlah bunga yang diperoleh atau dibebankan sama di setiap periode.

children.name: Bunga Majemuk
children.description: Bunga dihitung dari modal awal ditambah akumulasi bunga sebelumnya ('bunga berbunga').

children.name: Prinsip Geometri
children.description: Pertumbuhan dana mengikuti pola barisan geometri dengan rasio pengali konstan.

children.name: Pertumbuhan Eksponensial
children.description: Nilai modal yang berbunga terus membesar secara eksponensial.

metadata.atp_reference: Menghitung dan membedakan bunga tunggal serta bunga majemuk dalam konteks keuangan.
